- If Pizza is true, then Steak/Soup are false. The constraints force Sandwich false, Tacos true, Chicken false, Pasta true, Burger false, Fish true, Rice true, Salad false, and then both Noodles false and Noodles true — contradiction.

So Sushi must be false.

- Constraint 40 says Curry or Sandwich must be true.
- If Sandwich were true, then constraints force Rice, Pasta, Fish, Tacos, and Steak true, Burger false, but constraint 28 would then force Burger true — contradiction.

- With Burger true and Noodles false, constraint 9 forces Pizza false.
- Constraint 108 then forces Steak true.

- Constraint 90 forces Chicken true.
- Constraint 26 forces Rice false.
- Constraint 106 forces Fish true.
- Constraint 105 forces Tacos false.
- Constraint 107 forces Salad false.

Thus the ordered items are Curry, Steak, Chicken, Pasta, Fish, and Burger.
